best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-001 title: user creation and authentication module: user source pages: 1,2 preconditions: no active user session. test data: - username: testuser - password: testpassword - email: testuser@example.com - neighborhood: testneighborhood - photo: testphoto.jpg - companyname: testcompany - companydescription: testdescription test steps: 1. navigate to the user creation page. 2. enter username, password, email, neighborhood, photo, company name, and company description. 3. click on the "create user" button. 4. system checks if the user already exists. 5. if the user does not exist, system creates a new user. 6. system authenticates the user. 7. if credentials are valid, user is redirected to the home page. 8. if credentials are invalid, user is prompted to re-enter credentials. expected result: - user is created and authenticated successfully, and redirected to the home page.
